storyHook: 商量何时何地见面，确认准时

narrative.where: 甲的办公室，用手机商量
narrative.who: 甲（发起邀约的人）· 乙（朋友）
narrative.how: 对着日历商量哪天哪个时间见面
narrative.method: 提出邀约、对比空闲时间、定下地点、互相重复确认
narrative.event: 甲想约乙这周末见面，但两人时间都很紧

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Are you free this week-end?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. What day did you have in mind?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Which day at the end of the week is best for you?
turns.zh: 周末的哪一天你最合适？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I have a meeting on the first day of the week-end. The second day is full.
turns.zh: 周六上午有个会，周日全天都排满了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I work on the day before the first day of the week, but am free after four.
turns.zh: 我周六上午上班，但四点后有空。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: So four on day seven? That is good for me.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Great. Let us get together at the new place near the office.
turns.zh: 好。我们在公司附近那家新店碰头？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, I have had good word about their warm plates.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is good. Four on the last day of the week at that place.
turns.zh: 很好。周末那天四点那家店。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. Four. Do not be late.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will put it in my box now. Day six, four, the new place.
turns.zh: 我现在记到手机里。周六，四点，那家新店。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. I will do the same. alright then.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: And if I am early, I will get a table.
turns.zh: 要是我早到，我就先占个位子。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is kind. I will do my best not to keep you waiting.
turns.zh: 你真好。我尽量不让你等。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: No trouble. Looking forward to it.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will be there by four. You will see me at the door.
turns.zh: 我四点前到。你在门口就能看到我。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Let us get a table by the window?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: If it is free, yes. I like to see the street.
turns.zh: 有空位的话当然好。我喜欢看街景。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Me too. And I will get a warm plate for us to start.
turns.zh: 我也是。我先点个热菜开胃。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Not too sharp, please. Keep it soft.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will say that to the man there. No sharp taste.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Then we can take our time with the list.
turns.zh: 好。那我们可以慢慢看菜单。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes. No need to be quick. The night is long.
turns.zh: 对。不用急。晚上时间长着呢。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: True. So I will okay at four sharp.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Four sharp. I will be there.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. What time does the place open?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It starts at twelve, I would say. But we go at four, so no trouble.
turns.zh: 好像中午十二点开门。我们四点去，没问题。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Do we need to get a table before?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Not for a day off at four. It will be quiet then.
turns.zh: 周六四点不用。那时候人少。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. I will put it in my box now.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Put it down. I will do the same. No chance to let it go.
turns.zh: 记上。我也记一下。不会忘。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Let us get a drink first. A beer or something soft?
turns.zh: 要不要先喝一杯？啤酒还是软饮？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: A cold beer sounds good. But not too much before the food.
turns.zh: 冰啤酒不错。但饭前别喝太多。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: One beer for me, one for you, then a warm plate. A good start.
turns.zh: 我一杯啤酒，你一杯，再上个热菜。这样开场挺好。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes. I am looking forward to it. okay on day six.
turns.zh: 嗯。我挺期待的。第六天见。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right, cold plate first? Good start to the meal.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good idea. Then a warm plate with bird.
turns.zh: 好主意。然后上一道鸡肉的热菜。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will have the same. No sharp bits for me, please.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I will say it when we get there.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. Day six, four, cold plate first.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, warm bird first?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No, cold plate first, then warm. That is the way.
turns.zh: 不行，先冷盘再热菜。就该这样。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is right. But I am in need of food now.
turns.zh: 行吧。可我现在需要吃东西。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: It is only three. We have one more hour.
turns.zh: 才三点。还有一个小时呢。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. What drink with the cold plate?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Water for me. Keep it simple.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I will have the same. No sharp bits on the cold plate?
turns.zh: 行。我也一样。冷盘不放辣吧？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No sharp bits. Just salt and oil.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. Then the warm plate with bird and no sharp bits.
turns.zh: 好。那鸡肉热菜也不放辣。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes. I will say it when we get there.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Let us get together at the new place on High Street.
turns.zh: 咱们在高街那家新店碰头吧。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes. I have word it is a good place.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will book a table for four. Is that right?
turns.zh: 我订四个人的位子，对吧？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. Four of us. No more.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: What time do you get off work on the last day of the week?
turns.zh: 你在一周的最后一天几点下班？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I am free after three. So four is good.
turns.zh: 我三点后有空。所以四点合适。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. I will put it in my box now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Put me down for the same. This day week, four, High Street.
turns.zh: 我也记下。下周六，四点，高街。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will be there on time. You will not be late?
turns.zh: 我会准时到。你不会迟到吧？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I am not late. alright then.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Is four on day seven good for you?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, four is good. Where?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The new place near my office. You have seen it?
turns.zh: 我公司附近那家新店。你见过吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I do. I have not been there.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: They say the warm food is good there.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. I will have a warm plate then.
turns.zh: 好。那我到时候点个热盘。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: What about a cold plate to start?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, that sounds good. Not too sharp, please.
turns.zh: 行，听着不错。别太辣就行。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I will keep that in mind.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: So, four on day seven. I will be there.
turns.zh: 那就第七天四点。我会到的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Well, good. I will put it in my box now.
turns.zh: 好。我现在就记在盒子里。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Do that. I have it here too.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Is the door of the place a good meeting point?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes. That is simple. Four at the door.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: What if I am a little late?
turns.zh: 要是我晚到一小会儿呢？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Then I will get a table and start with a drink.
turns.zh: 那我就先占座，点杯喝的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I will do my best not to be late.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. I will be there at ten to four.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You are early. I will be on time.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. So, four on day seven, at the door. Done.
turns.zh: 行。那就周六四点，门口见。定了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, a warm plate or a cold one?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: A warm plate, I would say. The weather is cold.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. Their meat soup is good.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I would like that. Not too sharp, please.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: And some greens?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, a green one. No dressing, if they have.
turns.zh: 好，绿叶的。有的话不要酱。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I will put it in my notes.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You keep things in order. I like that.
turns.zh: 你安排得真清楚。我喜欢。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It keeps things simple. So, four at the door.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Four at the door. I will be there.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. I will put it in my notes now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Do you have a place in mind?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, the new place near my office. Warm plates.
turns.zh: 有，我公司附近那家新店。热菜不错。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I have not been there. Is it good?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, a friend said the cold plate is good too.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Then let us go there. Four, right?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. Four at the door. I will be on time.
turns.zh: 对，四点门口见。我会准时。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Well, good. I will put it in my notes now.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Well, do you have a place in mind?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Well, yes, the new place near my office. Warm plates.
turns.zh: 对，我公司旁边那家新开的店，热菜挺好。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I have not been there. Is it any good?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right, a friend said the cold plate is good too.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Well, then let us go there. Four, right?
turns.zh: 那我们就去那边。四点，对吧？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Well, right. Four at the door. I will be on time.
turns.zh: 好的。四点门口见。我准时到。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. alright then.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: okay. Do not be late.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You too. I will be there.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Well, right. I will put it in my box now.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. I have it. Four, the day before the rest day.
turns.zh: 好。我记下了。四点，休息日的前一天。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes. See you then. No changes.

storyBlurb: 周末约见，两人时间都紧。甲对着手机日历，和乙反复确认时间。
storyScript:
【开场·提出邀约】周三中午，甲在办公室吃完午饭，掏出手机给乙发消息。周末想见个面，但甲知道乙最近也很忙。他打字：这周六或周日，有空吗？发完，盯着屏幕等回复。窗外阳光正好，办公室里键盘声噼啪作响。

【进行·敲定时间】乙很快回：周六上午有会，下午三点后空；周日全天忙。甲翻看自己的日程：周六上午加班，下午四点前都空。两人在手机上来回对比，最终定在周六下午四点。甲提议：去公司附近那家新开的店？乙回：好，那家听说不错。甲又补一句：或者你想吃别的？乙说：就那家吧，听说热菜很好。甲回：OK，四点见。

【进行·敲定时间】甲把时间地点记在手机日历上，又发一条：周六下午四点，XX路那家店。乙回：收到，四点。甲再确认：对，四点。别迟到。乙笑回：你才别迟到。甲看着屏幕，嘴角微扬。午休快结束了，他收起手机，心里踏实了。

【收束·确认提醒】下班前，甲又看了一眼日历，给乙发：明天周六，四点见。乙秒回：记得，四点。甲放心了。周末的期待在周三的午后悄悄生长。
